title: Worst U.S. Drought in Decades Puts Spring Crops at Risk
summary: A massive drought has emerged across large swaths of the US agricultural belt, threatening crops and livestock and eventually affecting food prices, at a time when fertilizer and diesel costs are soaring. As of early April, 60% of the Lower 48 is in drought as the Northern Hemisphere growing season…

title: US Oil, Gas Drilling Activity Slows
summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States fell this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Friday, bringing the total rig count in the US to 543, down 42 from this same time last year. The number of active oil rigs slipped by 1 to 410 during t…

title: If a violent downturn strikes the market, new ETF strategies may be vulnerable. Here's why
summary: Innovation in the exchange-traded fund industry could come at a cost to investors during extreme volatility.
